title: Create: Dreams & Desires (fixed Bore Blocks)
description: This mod adds a fix for "Create: Dreams & Desires" which resolves an issue with the hitbox of the bore block.
body:
This is an addon for the mod _**Create: Dreams & Desires**_ which fixes an issue with the hitbox of the bore block, as Sable makes Create contraptions have a hitbox. It really only changes one single line of code. This is an **addon**, so you'll need _**Create: Dreams & Desires**_ installed as well.

This mod was made for the use of mining machines, such as the **Bagger 211**, made by _Reliantshell_. Here is the video about it:

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/zqJ5zkbMh8I" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
